meta.title: mybetrecord - Umukino wa Siporo nziza, ROI & Kelly Stake Ledger
meta.description: Kurikirana buri beti mu gitabo kimwe gifite disipuline. ROI, umusaruro, Kelly imigabane, CLV, umurongo ungana, hamwe no kohereza hanze - yubatswe kubantu bahitamo umubare.
meta.pricingDescription: Igitabo cyimikino yo gutega kubuntu hamwe nibintu byuzuye, cyangwa Pro yo kwinjirira iminsi itagira imipaka hafi $ 5 USD buri kwezi mumafaranga yawe.

home.heroTitle: Imikino yo gutega siporo kubantu bahitamo umubare
home.heroLead: Hagarika guhuza impapuro. Andika buri wageri, ukurikirane ROI n'umusaruro, ingano zingana na Kelly, hanyuma urebe aho inkombe yawe ituye.
home.section1Title: Kuva ku rupapuro rw'akajagari kugeza ku rutonde rufite indero
home.section1Sub: Abaterankunga benshi barenze inyandiko za porogaramu na tabs ya Excel. mybetrecord iguha umwanya umwe wo kwandika amajwi, gukemura ibisubizo, no gusoma imibare yimikorere.
home.featureOddsDesc: Imiterere icumi, Abanyamerika, ibice, na Aziya - bisanzwe bisanzwe kuburyo raporo ziguma zihamye.
home.featureKellyDesc: Shiraho amabanki n'impapuro zinjira; shaka ingano yimigabane ishingiye kubipimo bya Kelly.
home.featureRoiDesc: Igipimo cyo gukubita, kugurisha, inyungu ukwezi, hamwe no guhuriza hamwe kugabana kugurishwa.
home.featureBreakdownsDesc: Gabanya imikorere ya siporo, ubwoko bwa bet, tipster, cyangwa abakora ibitabo kugirango ubone aho utsindira.
home.featureClvDesc: Andika ibintu bisoza kandi upime CLV - ikimenyetso gikaze kuruta ibisubizo byigihe gito wenyine.
home.featureExportDesc: Kuramo CSV, Excel, cyangwa JSON. Kora urufunguzo rwa API rwimyandikire no kwikora.
home.pricingSub: Ibintu byose bikurikira biri muri gahunda zombi. Pro ikuraho capage ya buri munsi - hafi $ 5 USD buri kwezi mumafaranga yawe.
home.pricingFreeLimit: Kugera kuri 5 bets na 5 multis kumunsi
home.pricingProLimit: Imipaka itagira imipaka na multis buri munsi
home.pricingFeatureLedger: Igitabo cyuzuye cyuzuye - ibyabaye, guhitamo, imigabane, ibisubizo & P / L.
home.pricingFeatureOdds: Imiterere yose itandukanye - icumi, Abanyamerika, ibice & Aziya
home.pricingFeatureTypes: Ubwoko bwose bwo guhitamo - gutsinda, buri nzira, hejuru-munsi, multis & handicap
home.pricingFeatureKelly: Kelly imigabane ingana na banki yawe & yavuzwe
home.pricingFeatureReports: ROI, umusaruro, igipimo cyo guhagarika & cumulative equite curve
home.pricingFeatureBreakdowns: Gucika kumikino, ubwoko bwa bet, tipster & bookmaker
home.pricingFeatureEdge: Icyitegererezo & kugiti cyawe cyerekanwe hamwe na buri gice
home.pricingNote: Pro ni hafi $ 5 USD buri kwezi, yerekanwe mumafaranga yawe. Hagarika igihe icyo aricyo cyose uhereye kuri Igenamiterere.
home.section2Title: Kuyobora kuva kuri blog ya mybetrecord
home.section2Sub: Wige imibare inyuma yibipimo - hanyuma ubikurikirane mubitabo byawe.
home.blogRoiDesc: Imibare ibiri yumutwe, akenshi urujijo. Menya igisubizo gisubiza ikibazo.
home.blogKellyDesc: Uburyo bwiza bwo kugereranya imigabane ikora - nimpamvu abaterankunga benshi bakoresha agace ka Kelly kuzuye.
home.blogSpreadsheetDesc: Iyo Excel ihagije - kandi mugihe igitabo cyabigenewe kibika amasaha namakosa.
home.faqTrackerA: Igitabo cyubatswe kuri buri wageri - imigabane, ibidashoboka, ibisubizo, ninyungu - hamwe na ROI yikora, umusaruro, no gusenyuka aho gukoresha urupapuro rwabigenewe.
home.faqOddsA: Icumi, Abanyamerika, ibice, Hong Kong, Maleziya, na Indoneziya. Bets zose zibitswe hamwe na kanoniki ya decimal idasanzwe yo gutanga raporo.
home.faqKellyQ: Nigute imigabane ya Kelly ikora hano?
home.faqKellyA: Injira ibintu byihariye bivuze kuri bet. Hamwe na banki hamwe na Kelly kugwiza byashyizweho mugushiraho, porogaramu irasaba imigabane ukurikije impande zavuzwe.
home.faqExportA: Yego - CSV, Excel, na JSON byohereza hanze hiyongereyeho urufunguzo rwa API kugirango porogaramu igere kubyo wanditse.
home.faqTipsterA: Oya mybetrecord ni kubika inyandiko no gusesengura gusa. Ntabwo tugurisha amatora cyangwa gusezeranya inyungu.
home.rg: Gukina urusimbi. Guhitamo bigomba kuba imyidagaduro, ntabwo byinjiza. Ntuzigere ugabana ibirenze ibyo ushobora guhomba. Niba urusimbi rugira ingaruka ku buzima bwawe, shakisha ubufasha mumashyirahamwe nka BeGambleAware cyangwa Gambling. mybetrecord ntabwo yorohereza gushyira inshuti - igufasha kumva amateka yawe.
home.ctaLead: Kora konti yubuntu hanyuma wandike inshuti yawe yambere muminota.
home.footerCopy: © mybetrecord. Isesengura no kubika inyandiko - ntabwo ari inama zo gukina urusimbi.

blog.indexSub: Wige imibare inyuma yibipimo - hanyuma ubikurikirane mubitabo byawe.

spreadsheet-vs-betting-tracker.title: Urupapuro rwabigenewe vs Urutonde rwabigenewe
spreadsheet-vs-betting-tracker.description: Iyo Excel ihagije kubyo wanditseho - kandi mugihe umukurikirana wabigenewe abika umwanya, amakosa, nibibanza bihumye.
spreadsheet-vs-betting-tracker.body:
Urupapuro rusesuye ni intangiriro yo gutangira inyandiko zose. Nubuntu, byoroshye, kandi biramenyerewe. Abaterankunga benshi ntibigera babasiga. Abandi bakubise urukuta - mubisanzwe iyo bigoye kurenza selile na formula.

Iyo urupapuro rukora

  • Bake kurenza ~ 50 bets buri kwezi
  • Siporo imwe, ifaranga rimwe, impinduka zidasanzwe gusa
  • Ibisubizo byoroshye gutsindira / gutsindwa, nta nzira-imwe cyangwa komisiyo yo guhana
  • Ukunda kubungabunga formula

Aho impapuro zimeneka

Ikibazo Urupapuro rwerekana ububabare Inyungu zabakurikirana
Imiterere idasanzwe Intoki zo guhindura inkingi Ubusanzwe busanzwe
Buri nzira / EW Amakosa akunze gutandukana Yubatswe-gutura
Ingano ya Kelly Ongera wubake iyo banki ihindutse Icyifuzo cya Live kuri beti
CLV Inkingi zinyongera, byoroshye gusimbuka Umwanya kuri buri beti
Kumeneka Kubungabunga ameza ya pivot Kanda rimwe na siporo / tipster
API / kwikora Inyandiko zoroshye Urufunguzo rwa mbere rwa API urufunguzo
Kwinjira kuri terefone Clunky Porogaramu y'urubuga yitabira

Igiciro cyihishe: igihe

Iminota icumi mucyumweru ikosora formulaire hamwe na kopi-paste amakosa arenze ikiguzi cyigikoresho cyabigenewe kubantu bose bahitamo bikomeye. Igiciro kinini ni ibyemezo bibi biva mumibare mibi - icyuho cyinjiye nkigihombo, komisiyo yibagiwe.

Inzira yo kwimuka

  1. Kohereza ibyo ufite byose (CSV nibyiza)
  2. Kuzana cyangwa kongera gufungura ibihe byashize ibihe byashize
  3. Koresha parallel ibyumweru bibiri - byose bigomba guhura
  4. Ikiruhuko cy'urupapuro iyo raporo zemeranijwe

Ibyo abakurikirana batagomba gukora

Ntigomba kugurisha amatora, gusezeranya ROI, cyangwa gusimbuza disipuline ya banki. mybetrecord nisesengura no kubika inyandiko - urupapuro ntushobora kumeneka kubwimpanuka.

Gerageza byombi mubyukuri

Bika urupapuro rwawe ukwezi kumwe ariko wandike inshyi nshya muri mybetrecord. Gereranya inyungu-ukwezi kurangira n'umusaruro. Niba bihuye hamwe nabakurikirana babitse umwanya, hindura.

Tangira ubuntu: Kora konti - nta karita isabwa gutangira kwinjira.

betting-equity-curve.title: Gusoma Ibyiza byawe Bingana
betting-equity-curve.description: Kuringaniza umurongo uteganya inyungu yumwanya mugihe. Wige icyo ishusho isobanura, kuki gutegereza bitegerejwe, hamwe nuburyo bwo gutembera.
betting-equity-curve.body:
Kuringaniza umurongo ni umurongo wimbonerahamwe yinyungu (cyangwa banki) nyuma ya buri cyiciro cyakemuwe, muburyo bukurikirana. Ihindura imbonerahamwe y'ibisubizo mu nkuru ushobora gusoma ukireba.

Ukuntu umurongo muzima umeze

Impande nziza hamwe no gushishoza byabyara umusaruro ugana hejuru - ntabwo ari umurongo ugororotse. Ibihe bigufi cyangwa hasi nibisanzwe biratandukanye; gutwarwa bikomeje kukurwanya bishobora kwerekana urugero rwangirika cyangwa kunyerera.

Imiterere isanzwe yumurongo

Gusya bihamye - impande nto, siporo itandukanye (amasoko yo kuvunja). Gabanya ahahanamye, ibishushanyo bito.

Imitsi ihindagurika - ishusho ndende-iremereye. Ingano nini; ROI yonyine irayobya idafite imiterere yimigabane.

Igitonyanga cya Cliff - akenshi imigabane yiyongereye nyuma yumurongo ushushe (imyitwarire itari Kelly) cyangwa ingamba zo guhindura hagati yicyitegererezo.

Gutegereza inshuti

Imodoka idahwitse ntigomba kugaragara kumurongo ungana - ntibaramenya P / L kugeza ubu. Harimo gushiramo cyangwa guhindagura umurongo mubihimbano.

Bankroll vs inyungu yo kugabanuka

Imbonerahamwe imwe itegura gutangira banki + inyungu yumubare ; abandi bategura inyungu gusa. Huza imbonerahamwe nuburyo ucunga amafaranga mumutwe. mybetrecord & rsquo; imigabane ingana ikoresha inyungu ihamye mugihe; banki muri ticker ikubiyemo uburyo bwawe bwo gutangiza banki wongeyeho P / L.

Ukoresheje umurongo usuzumye

  1. Shyira ahagaragara ingamba zihinduka mugihe (siporo nshya, inama nshya)
  2. Gereranya umurongo uhetamye mbere / nyuma yo guhinduka
  3. Kurengaho igereranyo rusange - ni itandukaniro ryimigabane itwarwa cyangwa irayoborwa?

Huza hamwe nibindi bipimo

Imirongo iringaniye ibeshya mugusiba niba wirengagije CLV, umusaruro, nubunini bwikitegererezo. Koresha umurongo wo gushishoza; koresha imbonerahamwe yo gufata ibyemezo.

Reba umurongo wawe uhwanye muri raporo ya mybetrecord nyuma yo kwandikisha udukoryo duke.

each-way-bet-settlement.title: Buri-Inzira Nziza Gutura Byasobanuwe
each-way-bet-settlement.description: Uburyo buri nzira yo gutega yishura intsinzi no gushyira ibice. Ingero zakozwe hamwe nuduce duto hamwe namategeko yubushyuhe.
each-way-bet-settlement.body:
An buri nzira-nzira ni inshuro ebyiri muri imwe: kimwe cya kabiri cyigice cyo guhitamo gutsinda, igice cyacyo kugirango ushire (kurangiza ahantu ukurikije amagambo yigitabo). Gukemura imibare igenda hejuru y'urupapuro rwinshi.

Imiterere

Igiteranyo cyose S igabanijwe:

  • Gutsindira igice: S / 2 mugihe cyo gutsinda
  • Shyira igice: S / 2 ahantu hatandukanye

Shyira ibintu bidasanzwe = 1 + (gutsindira amahirwe - 1) × agace gaciriritse

Igice gisanzwe: 1/4 cyangwa 1/5 cyo gutsinda.

Urugero - uwatsinze

£ 20 buri nzira (win 10 gutsindira + £ umwanya wa 10) kuri 10.00 gutsindira amahirwe, 1/4 cyumwanya.

  • Gutsindira igice cyishyura: 10 × £ 10 = £ 100 kugaruka (profit 90 inyungu)
  • Shyira ahabona: 1 + (10 - 1) × 0.25 = 3.25 → 3.25 × £ 10 = £ 32.50 kugaruka (profit 22.50 inyungu)
  • Inyungu zose = £ 90 + £ 22.50 = £ 112.50

Urugero - rushyizwe gusa

Kimwe, ifarashi irangiza kabiri (ahantu hishyuwe, nta ntsinzi):

  • Gutsindira igice gutsindwa: - £ 10
  • Shyira igice cyatsinze: £ 22.50 inyungu nkuko byavuzwe haruguru
  • Inyungu nziza = £ 12.50

Urugero - rudasimbuwe

Ibice byombi birahomba: - £ 20 (igiti cyuzuye).

Guhana n'imanza zidasanzwe

Kungurana ibitekerezo akenshi gutandukanya gutsindira no gushyira amasoko - nta tike imwe imwe. Ubushyuhe bupfuye bugabanya aho gusubira. Ingingo ya 4 igabanywa ikoreshwa kubice byo gutsindira ibice.

Buri gihe wandike buri_way = ukuri na umwanya_ibice mugitabo cyawe kugirango software ikoreshe formula imwe burigihe.

Kurikirana buri nzira muri mybetrecord

.

odds-formats-decimal-american-fractional.title: Imiterere idasanzwe - Icumi, Abanyamerika, na Bice
odds-formats-decimal-american-fractional.description: Hindura hagati yimibare, Abanyamerika, nibice bitandukanye. Imbonerahamwe hamwe na formulaire ya Hong Kong, Maleziya, na Indoneziya.
odds-formats-decimal-american-fractional.body:
Abakora ibitabo kwisi yose berekana ibiciro muburyo butandukanye. Igitabo gifite disipuline kibika imwe Canonical decimal imbere mugihe ikwemerera kwinjiza inshuti muburyo ubwo aribwo bwose ubona kuri ecran.

Icumi (Iburayi)

Inyungu zose kumugabane umwe harimo imigabane. Icumi 2.50 → gutsindira £ 1.50 inyungu kuri £ 1 ifunze.

Inyungu = imigabane × (icumi - 1)

Umunyamerika (umurongo w'amafaranga)

Ibyiza (+150): inyungu kumugabane £ 100. +150 → icumi icumi 2.50.

Ibibi (−200): imigabane ikenewe kugirango utsinde £ 100. −200 → icumi 1.50.

Guhindura:

  • Niba Umunyamerika & gt; 0: icumi = 1 + Umunyamerika / 100
  • Niba Umunyamerika & lt; 0: icumi = 1 + 100 / | Umunyamerika |

Igice (UK)

6/4 bisobanura gutsinda £ 6 kuri buri £ 4 bifatanye. Umubare icumi = 1 + kubara / gutandukanya = 2.50.

Imbuga zimwe zerekana & ldquo; 6/4 & rdquo; nk'igice cyo gutsinda gusa; burigihe wemeze niba igiti kirimo gushyirwa ahagaragara.

Imiterere ya Aziya

Imiterere Urugero Icumi
Hong Kong 0,85 1.85
Maleziya + 0,85 1.85
Maleziya - −0.85 1 + 1 / 0.85 ≈ 2.176
Indoneziya + 1.50 2.50
Indoneziya - −1.50 1 + 1 / 1.50 ≈ 1.667

Impamvu ibisanzwe bifite akamaro

Kuvanga imiterere murupapuro rumwe rutera amakosa yo guceceka - Ibimenyetso byo gukuramo Abanyamerika, gutandukanya ibice, cyangwa gufata HK nkibice icumi. Porogaramu igomba guhinduka kwinjiza kandi ntizigere itakaza neza.

Inama ifatika

>

mybetrecord yemera imiterere yose yanditse kandi ikabika ibintu icumi kuri buri raporo no kubara Kelly.

closing-line-value-clv.title: Gufunga Umurongo Agaciro (CLV) - Impamvu Ikarishye Ikurikirana
closing-line-value-clv.description: Gufunga umurongo agaciro bipima niba utsinze igiciro cyanyuma cyisoko. Wige kubara CLV n'impamvu iteganya ubuhanga bwigihe kirekire.
closing-line-value-clv.body:
Gufunga umurongo agaciro (CLV) ugereranya impinduka wafashe ugereranije nibishobora kuboneka mugihe isoko ryafunze (mubisanzwe biratangira cyangwa kwiruka). Gukubita hafi buri gihe nimwe mubikomeye byerekana inyungu zigihe kirekire - zikomeye kuruta ukwezi kwamahirwe & rsquo; P / L.

Impamvu umurongo wo gusoza ufite akamaro

Amasoko yegeranya amakuru. Igiciro cyo gusoza cyerekana igereranyo kiboneka mbere yicyabaye. Niba usanzwe ubona 2.10 mugihe cyo gufunga ari 2.00, urabona agaciro mbere yuko isoko ikosora.

Kubara CLV

Igisobanuro rusange:

CLV% = (impinduka zawe icumi ÷ gufunga ibintu icumi - 1) × 100%

Urugero: uhitamo kuri 2.20, gufunga byari 2.00.

CLV = (2.20 ÷ 2.00 - 1) × 100 = + 10%

CLV itari nziza bivuze ko wafashe nabi kurenza hafi - niyo gutsindira gutsinda birashobora kuba inzira mbi.

CLV vs ibisubizo

Itandukaniro rihisha ubuhanga hejuru yintangarugero. Urashobora gutakaza amafaranga hamwe na CLV nziza kumayinga, cyangwa ugatsinda na CLV itari nziza kuri hoteri. Kurikirana CLV hejuru yamajana kugirango ucire urubanza inzira.

Ibyo kwandika

Kuri buri beto, kubika:

  • Ibitekerezo byawe byafashwe (imiterere iyo ari yo yose)
  • Gufunga ibintu bidasanzwe (isoko rimwe, guhitamo kimwe)
  • Igihe cyerekana niba umurongo wimuka imbere-umunsi

Guhana gufunga bitandukanye nibitabo byoroshye gufunga - guma uhamye muri dataset yawe.

Imipaka

  • Gufunga umurongo ntabwo arukuri kwukuri - kugenda kwamazi birashobora no kwibeshya
  • Kwamamaza bidasanzwe kandi bizamura kugereranya kugereranya
  • Amasoko mato afite urusaku rufunga

Koresha CLV muri mybetrecord

Ongeraho gusoza ibintu byinjira cyangwa guhindura. Raporo irashobora kugereranya impuzandengo ya CLV kuruhande rwa ROI kuburyo utandukanya amahirwe kuruhande.

kelly-criterion-explained.title: Ibipimo bya Kelly byasobanuwe neza
kelly-criterion-explained.description: Ingano ya Kelly ingana kuva kuruhande no gutandukana. Wige formula, Kelly igabanije, nurugero rwumubare ushobora kugenzura.
kelly-criterion-explained.body:
Ibipimo bya Kelly bisubiza ikibazo kimwe: ukurikije aho ugereranyije, ni ikihe gice cya banki ukwiye kugabana kugirango uzamure iterambere rirambye - utiriwe uhungabanya ingaruka mbi imwe?

Inzira (impinduka zidasanzwe)

Kubintu bitandukanijwe O no gutsinda bishoboka p :

Igice cya Kelly = ( O × p - 1) / ( O - 1)

Gufata = Igice cya Kelly × banki (akenshi igwizwa numutekano).

Urugero rwumubare

Wizera ko ikipe ifite amahirwe ya 55% yo gutsinda kuri decimal 2.00 (niyo amafaranga).

  • p = 0.55, O = 2.0
  • Kelly = (2.0 × 0.55 - 1) / (2.0 - 1) = 0.10 / 1.0 = 10% ya banki

Kuri banki 1.000, Kelly yuzuye atanga £ 100. Abaterankunga benshi bakoresha igice cya Kelly (5%, £ 50) cyangwa igihembwe Kelly kugirango bagabanye itandukaniro.

Impande zivuye kubintu bidasanzwe

Niba & ldquo; byiza & rdquo; igiciro ni icumi 1.91 (bivuze 52.4%) ukabona 2.00 (bivuze 50%), ufite impande nziza. Kelly ahindura iyo mpande wongeyeho ibintu bitandukanye mubunini.

Kuki tutahora twuzuye Kelly?

Kelly yuzuye yerekana iterambere rya geometrike mubitekerezo. Mu myitozo:

  • Ikigereranyo cyawe p nikosa kenshi kuruta uko ubitekereza
  • Gutera icyarimwe icyarimwe bifitanye isano (shampiyona imwe, umunsi umwe)
  • Ibitekerezo bya psychologiya bitera kureka sisitemu

Igice cya Kelly (0.25–0.5 ×) gisanzwe mubaterankunga babigize umwuga.

Amakosa asanzwe

  • Koresha Kelly mugihe udafite igereranya ryukuri
  • Gukoresha Kelly kumirongo ifitanye isano nkibintu byigenga
  • Kwirengagiza amabanki atariyo rwose & ldquo; imari shingiro & rdquo;

Kurikirana Kelly muri mybetrecord

Shiraho banki na Kelly kugwiza mumiterere. Injira kugiti cyawe kuri buri beto kugirango ubone imigabane isabwa kuruhande rwawe - kugenzura ubwenge, ntabwo ari itegeko.

roi-vs-yield-sports-betting.title: ROI vs Yitanga muri Siporo nziza
roi-vs-yield-sports-betting.description: ROI n'umusaruro wo gupima imikorere itandukanye. Wige formulaire, ingero zakozwe, nigihe cyo gukoresha buri metero.
roi-vs-yield-sports-betting.body:
ROI (garuka ku ishoramari) na umusaruro ni imibare ibiri y'imitwe y'imitwe ikomeye. Bifitanye isano ariko ntibishobora guhinduka - ukoresheje ibitari byo birashobora gutuma ukwezi-kuruhuka ukwezi bisa nkibiza, cyangwa ubundi.

Ibisobanuro

ROI = inyungu zose akes imigabane yose × 100%

Umusaruro = inyungu zose turn ibicuruzwa byose × 100%

Kubaterankunga-baterankunga batigera bongera ubunini, ibicuruzwa bingana imigabane nimibare ihuye. Iyo imigabane imaze gutandukana - Ingano ya Kelly, ikomatanya, cyangwa ibice bivanze - biratandukana.

Urugero rwakazi

Tuvuge ko inshuro zirenga 10 zashizweho washyizeho £ 100 buri gihe (£ 1.000 imigabane yose) hanyuma ukunguka £ 50.

  • ROI = 50 ÷ 1.000 × 100 = 5%
  • Umusaruro = 50 ÷ 1.000 × 100 = 5%

Noneho tuvuge ko inshuro imwe yari £ 500 naho izindi £ 50 (50 950 imigabane yose), inyungu imwe £ 50:

  • ROI = 50 ÷ 950 × 100 ≈ 5.3%
  • Umusaruro uracyerekana ibicuruzwa kimwe niba ibicuruzwa = imigabane

Urujijo rukunze kugaragara iyo abantu bavanze banki ROI (inyungu ÷ gutangira banki) na imigabane ROI . Buri gihe andika icyo ushaka kuvuga.

Igihe cyo gukoresha ROI

ROI kuri stake ibisubizo: & ldquo; Kuri buri pound nagize ibyago, nagarutse angahe? & rdquo; Nibyiza kugereranya ingamba nuburyo busa bwimigabane.

Igihe cyo gukoresha umusaruro

Umusaruro ku bicuruzwa birasanzwe muri raporo zinganda no kugenzura tipster. Ishimangira imikorere kuri buri gice cyakozwe hatitawe ku bunini bwa banki.

Igipimo cyo gukubita ntabwo gihagije

Igipimo cya 60% cyo guhagarika impuzandengo ugereranije 1.50 ni ugutakaza amafaranga. Hindura ROI / umusaruro hamwe nimpuzandengo hamwe na CLV kugirango urebe niba impande nukuri cyangwa zitandukanye.

Kwifata neza

Tora ibipimo bimwe byibanze hanyuma ubizirikane umwaka ushize. mybetrecord ivuga inyungu ninyungu kumaseti yatanzwe kugirango ubashe guhuza nurwego urwo arirwo rwose gahunda yawe yo gufata.

what-is-a-betting-ledger.title: Igitabo Cyiza Niki?
what-is-a-betting-ledger.description: Igitabo cyo gutega ni inyandiko yubatswe ya buri wageri ushyira. Wige impamvu abaterankunga bafite disipuline bagumana umwe nicyo ukurikirana.
what-is-a-betting-ledger.body:
A urupapuro rwo gutoranya ni inyandiko yuzuye, ikurikirana yigihe cyimodoka yawe: ibyo washyigikiye, kubitandukanye, kubwinshi, nuburyo byakemutse. Tekereza nk'itandukaniro riri hagati yo gukeka niba uri hejuru yigihe na kumenya .

Kuki impapuro zananiranye

Abaterankunga benshi batangirira muri Excel cyangwa Impapuro za Google. Ibyo bikora kugeza:

  • Inzira zimeneka mugihe wongeyeho inzira-zose cyangwa guhana komisiyo inkingi
  • Wibagiwe kwinjiza ubusa cyangwa amafaranga-hanze
  • Ntushobora gukata ukoresheje tipster cyangwa siporo utongeye kubaka ameza ya pivot

Igitabo cyabigenewe gisanzwe gisanzwe, gisubiza inyungu kuri buri kintu cyahinduwe, kandi kigakomeza raporo zihamye.

Ibyo kwandika

Nibura, log:

  1. Ibyabaye no gutoranya - ibisobanuro bihagije kugirango tumenye bet nyuma y'amezi
  2. Gufata n'ifaranga
  3. Impanuka (muburyo ubwo aribwo buryo igitabo cyerekana)
  4. Ibisubizo - gutegereza, gutsinda, gutsindwa, ubusa
  5. Inyungu yakemuwe - cyangwa ureke software ikure kumategeko y'ibisubizo

Imirima yateye imbere itandukanya abakurikirana gukarishye nabandika inoti bisanzwe:

  • Ibyifuzo byawe bwite (igiciro cyawe gikwiye)
  • Gufunga umurongo utandukanye (kuri CLV)
  • Impanuro cyangwa isoko yicyitegererezo
  • Abakora ibitabo na komisiyo

Ledger vs ikinyamakuru

Abantu bakoresha & ldquo; ikinyamakuru cyo gutega & rdquo; na & ldquo; igitabo cyo gutega & rdquo; bisimburana. Birakomeye, ikinyamakuru gishobora gushiramo inyandiko zerekana (& ldquo; wumva wihuta & rdquo;, & ldquo; umurongo wimutse & rdquo;); igitabo gishimangira imibare. Ibikoresho byiza bihuza byombi: amakuru yubatswe hiyongereyeho inyandiko-yubusa kubusa.

Ninde ukeneye umwe?

Umuntu wese ufata betting nkumukino wubuhanga kuruta amatike ya tombola:

  • Bahuye nabaterankunga bakurikirana ibyangombwa nubusa kubusa
  • Guhana abacuruzi bapima umusaruro wagenwe na komisiyo
  • Abayoboke ba Tipster bagenzura ROI yamamajwe
  • Abapanse b'imyidagaduro bashaka gucunga neza banki

Gutangira

Tora siporo imwe cyangwa ubwoko bwisoko hanyuma wandike inshuro 20 zikurikira udahinduye inzira yawe. Ongera usuzume igipimo cyo guhagarika akazi, impuzandengo, hamwe ninyungu icyumweru. Urwo rufatiro rufite agaciro kuruta inama zose.

Kurikirana ibi muri mybetrecord: kora konti yubuntu, shiraho banki yawe na format idasanzwe, hanyuma wandike inshuti yawe yambere muminota.
